scripts.build:ios: npm run check:node && npx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.build:android: npm run check:node && npx eas-cli build --platform android --profile production
scripts.build:all: npm run check:node && npx eas-cli build --platform all --profile production
scripts.submit:ios: npm run check:node && npx eas-cli submit --platform ios --profile production
scripts.submit:android: npm run check:node && npx eas-cli submit --platform android --profile production
